rationale: The skill orchestrates pre-deployment validation by reading and updating .azure/deployment-plan.md and reviewing infrastructure-as-code (Bicep/Terraform) plus azure.yaml. It explicitly invokes commands like 'azd provision --preview', 'bicep build', and 'terraform validate', which spawn azd/bicep/terraform/az subprocesses; build verification adds language-specific build tools (node/npm/dotnet/python). These azd/az/terraform CLI calls authenticate and query Azure ARM/Graph endpoints, hence the management.azure.com, login.microsoftonline.com, and graph.microsoft.com hosts; mcr.microsoft.com may be hit when pulling Bicep types/container images.
